UI components, structures, and functions for managing and animating timeline elements in Pebble firmware.


## Files
- **[peek_layer.c](peek_layer.c.md)**: Implements the PeekLayer UI component for managing and animating text and icons in a timeline.
- **[peek_layer.h](peek_layer.h.md)**: Defines the PeekLayer structure and functions for creating, managing, and animating peek layers in a UI.
- **[pin_window.c](pin_window.c.md)**: Implements a timeline pin window for displaying and managing timeline items in the Pebble firmware.
- **[pin_window.h](pin_window.h.md)**: Defines the TimelinePinWindow structure and functions for managing timeline pin windows in the Pebble firmware.
- **[text_node.c](text_node.c.md)**: Implements text node structures and functions for drawing and managing text layouts in a graphics context.
- **[text_node.h](text_node.h.md)**: Defines data structures and functions for creating and managing text nodes with various layout options.
- **[timeline.c](timeline.c.md)**: Implements the timeline application for Pebble firmware, managing state transitions, animations, and user interactions.
- **[timeline.h](timeline.h.md)**: Defines data structures and functions for managing timeline states and animations in the Pebble firmware.
- **[timeline_animations.c](timeline_animations.c.md)**: Functions for timeline animations, including interpolation and handling animation completion.
- **[timeline_animations.h](timeline_animations.h.md)**: Defines timeline animation functions and constants for the Pebble firmware.
- **[timeline_common.h](timeline_common.h.md)**: Defines constants and a type alias for timeline item display and direction in the Pebble firmware.
- **[timeline_layer.c](timeline_layer.c.md)**: Implements the timeline layer for Pebble firmware, handling layout, animations, and drawing functions.
- **[timeline_layer.h](timeline_layer.h.md)**: Header file for managing and animating timeline layers and relationship bars in a user interface.
- **[timeline_model.c](timeline_model.c.md)**: Implements a timeline model with circular array logic for managing and iterating timeline items.
- **[timeline_model.h](timeline_model.h.md)**: Defines the TimelineModel structure and functions for iterating and managing timeline items.
- **[timeline_private.h](timeline_private.h.md)**: License information for the Apache License, Version 2.0.
- **[timeline_relbar.c](timeline_relbar.c.md)**: Implements functions for managing and animating relationship bars in a timeline interface.
- **[timeline_relbar.h](timeline_relbar.h.md)**: Functions and types for managing and animating relationship bars in a timeline layer.
